items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and member invitations, none of them explicitly address the auditability of membership tiers at the time of access. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided for the requirement.
